title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Matthew Hoy 16 April 2025
body: "This is for failing on a bankruptcy to:  • obtain a valuation for three properties, although a Law of Property Act Receiver was subsequently appointed to one of them;  • obtain insurance on two properties for more than 17 months and failing in the meantime to determine whether the properties were already insured;  • not place restrictions on the properties until more than seven months following appointment. "
